mapper.select: SELECT file_id, url_path, ocr_raw_json::text as ocr_raw_json, ocr_parsed_json::text as ocr_parsed_json, created_at, user_id, tx_id, status FROM projectdb.receipt_files WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT file_id, url_path, ocr_raw_json::text as ocr_raw_json, ocr_parsed_json::text as ocr_parsed_json, created_at, user_id, tx_id, status FROM projectdb.receipt_files WHERE file_id = #{fileId}

SELECT file_id, url_path, ocr_raw_json::text as ocr_raw_json, ocr_parsed_json::text as ocr_parsed_json, created_at, user_id, tx_id, status FROM projectdb.receipt_files WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.receipt_files (url_path, user_id, status) VALUES (#{urlPath}, #{userId}, 'UPLOADED')
